## III. The Gallery

::: {.aside .meta-note}
**META (v2):** Gallery laid out along the tree. Kept short; the frame/fact machinery lives in §II. Where two worldviews share a node, the contrast is drawn on an axis or a crux, never on the mechanism they share.
:::

Each worldview sits on the branch where its catastrophe happens. If the tree is carved right, every serious view has to land somewhere on it, which lets us check each branch for a champion and notice the ones no one defends.

Most worldviews are located: they name a branch and say the danger is there. A few are distributional. Rather than pick a branch, they bet the dangerous ones are nearly empty, and attach to the one they most deny.
